content.full_text: On March 7, 1977, Nan Emmerson received a call from a county clerk with respect to the fining procedure for a late preelection candidate/committee consolidated campaign statement. Ken, Mike and I concluded that for fining purposes the consolidated campaign statement should be viewed as a single statement and thus fined at the rate of $10 per day rather than $20 per day. Liability would be joint and several between the candidate and committee.
